mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET PLC_NAME = #{dto.plcName}, PLC_ADDR = #{dto.plcAddr}, PLC_DADDR = #{dto.plcDaddr}, PLC_TELNO = #{dto.plcTelno}, PLC_HOMEPAGE = #{dto.plcHomepage}, PLC_OVERVIEW = #{dto.plcOverview}, PLC_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLC_NO = #{plcNo}

UPDATE PLACE_FOOD SET FOOD_OPENING_HOURS = #{dto.foodOpeningHours}, FOOD_PARKING = #{dto.foodParking}, FOOD_RESTDATE = #{dto.foodRestdate}, FOOD_MENU = #{dto.foodMenu}, FOOD_INFOCENTER = #{dto.foodInfocenter}, FOOD_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE FOOD_PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE p WHERE p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC003' AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'Y'
AND p.PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd}

SELECT p.PLC_NO AS plcNo, p.PLC_ID AS plcId, p.PLC_RGN_CD AS plcRgnCd, p.PLC_NAME AS plcName, p.PLC_ADDR AS plcAddr, p.PLC_DADDR AS plcDaddr, p.PLC_LAT AS plcLat, p.PLC_LOT AS plcLot, p.PLC_TELNO AS plcTelno, p.PLC_HOMEPAGE AS plcHomepage, p.PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, p.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl, p.PLC_THUM_IMG_URL AS plcThumImgUrl, p.PLC_FLT_CD AS plcFltCd, f.FOOD_OPENING_HOURS AS foodOpeningHours, f.FOOD_PARKING AS foodParking, f.FOOD_RESTDATE AS foodRestdate, f.FOOD_MENU AS foodMenu, f.FOOD_INFOCENTER AS foodInfocenter FROM PLACE p LEFT JOIN PLACE_FOOD f ON p.PLC_NO = f.FOOD_PLC_NO WHERE p.PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
